title: With Json (OVO)
description: Create all u want with Json!
body:
# This is a mod can let's you do somethins with Json!

**The goal is to make you feel like you're coding in Json!**

 

You can do this in Json without any Java code:

    Create some new Items.
    Create some new Foods.
    Create some new Blocks.
    Create some new Tools and Weapons.
    Create some new Recipes or delete some Recipes.
    Create some new Tabs


 

In Fabric, some of these are not available because the data package can do it well.

And we have some plans that we're going to do:

    Can let you create a new Event, and create the Enchantment and potion by it.
    Create a tree and put them in world.
    Create Armor and create the tool's meta.
    Make ovopackage can run in a jar!
    Make you can use the tab in vanilla. Because I worry that there will be problems, so this is a todo plan. Sorry :(

 

**Greate, so how to start?**

Read [readme](https://github.com/AmarokIce/WithJson/blob/master/Readme.md) or read the example!

[The example for 1.7.10](https://github.com/AmarokIce/WithJson/tree/master/ovo)

[The example for Fabric](https://github.com/AmarokIce/WithJson/tree/Fabric-1.16.5/ovo)

1.7.10 is LTS, if you world like to play in 1.7.10, follow the Readme to get news!

**Why didn't have more forge version?**

JsonThings is better then this, if we have no good reason, I think I will not do it.

This mod not a ported from Json Things, so you cannot use the Thingpack on With Json.
